topPlaces.name: Penna Ahobilam
topPlaces.description: Penna Ahobilam a is place near Anantapuramu, Andhra Pradesh, India, 12 km from Uravakonda and 36 km from Anantapur. It is well-linked by road with frequent bus services.

topPlaces.name: PABR Dam
topPlaces.description: Penna Ahobilam Balancing Reservoir (PABR) is an irrigation project located across Penna River in Anantapur district of Andhra Pradesh state in India. Anantapur city gets its drinking water from the PABR. The reservoir with live storage capacity of 305 million cubic metres is mainly fed by Tungabhadra high level canal originating from the Tungabhadra Dam to the extent of 10 Tmcft water.

items.note: Penna Ahobilam a is place near Anantapuramu, Andhra Pradesh, India, 12 km from Uravakonda and 36 km from Anantapur. It is well-linked by road with frequent bus services.

Penna Ahobilam Balancing Reservoir (PABR) is an irrigation project located across Penna River in Anantapur district of Andhra Pradesh state in India. Anantapur city gets its drinking water from the PABR. The reservoir with live storage capacity of 305 million cubic metres is mainly fed by Tungabhadra high level canal originating from the Tungabhadra Dam to the extent of 10 Tmcft water.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bellary Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (211 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam?
faq.a: Stays in Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakshmi Narasimha swamy temple, Penna Ahobilam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Penna Ahobilam, PABR Dam.
